data.title: 国际服活动「Get Set, Go! Kivotos Halo Festival!」
data.summary: [Event Preview] The Halo Festival finally begins, and the battle between academies is raging even in
data.body:
[Event Preview]

The Halo Festival finally begins, and the battle between academies is raging even in the Executive Committee!
Who will emerge victorious from this heated field day?
